common.name: Name
common.articleNoFulltext: No full text available for this article.

index.metaDescription: Explore climate adaptation strategies across forestry, fishery, and agriculture sectors.
index.heroSubtitle: Browse evidence-based adaptation papers by sector, search the corpus, and open documents to filter, compare, and pin insights for your work.
index.aboutBody: This explorer brings together curated adaptation knowledge from forestry, fishery, and agriculture. Choose a sector to focus your search, or explore everything at once. In the explorer you can run text search, apply filters, open full papers, and save findings to your pin board.
index.aboutHint: Start with a sector below, open all sectors, or jump straight to a text search.
index.featuresIntro: From discovery to sharing, the explorer and pin board help you turn adaptation evidence into action—with optional AI tools to focus, compare, and communicate what matters.

explore.title: Explore
explore.description: Search and filter the corpus to find experiences and case studies that can help you address your climate adaptation challenge.

board.title: Build your board
board.description: Save papers, excerpts, and insights to your pin board to grow a personal knowledge base you can return to and organise over time.

share.title: Share with colleagues
share.description: Share your board with colleagues so teams can review the same evidence, notes, and curated sources together.

curate.title: Focus on what matters
curate.description: Select a set of case studies and use AI to surface themes, risks, and takeaways that are most relevant to your context.

compare.title: Analyse
compare.description: Place articles side by side to compare approaches, regions, and outcomes without losing track of the source material.

generate.title: Create communication assets
generate.description: Generate derived content—such as summaries or presentation outlines—to support workshops, reports, and stakeholder conversations.

index.sectorAgricultureDescription: Droughts, soil degradation, pests, water scarcity
index.searchHint: Or start with a text search:
index.footerHint: Sector cards open the explorer with that focus. View all clears the sector filter so you can browse the full corpus.

meta.title: Climate Adaptation Explorer
meta.description: Search and explore climate adaptation case studies.

searchEmpty.textTip: Try to use only meaningful words. Remember that the language in the query must match the language you are using in the interface.
searchEmpty.filtersTitle: No case studies match your current filters
searchEmpty.filtersTip: Try removing or adjusting filters in the sidebar.
searchEmpty.genericTip: Refresh the page or try again later.

index.heroTitle: Explore the EU Climate Adaptation Mission ecosystem
index.heroIntro: Browse the network of projects and organisations shaping climate adaptation across Europe. Four lenses reveal how Mission-funded initiatives connect across topics, places and partnerships.

pins.boardEmpty: Start pinning items from the explorer to see them here.
pins.publicBoardEmpty: The board owner hasn't pinned items yet.
pins.sourceMissing: Source document is not linked; title and notes are still saved.
pins.summaryFullPaperView: {whole} full paper pin(s); {papersWithFragments} paper(s) with pinned content
pins.fullPaperSectionFragmentPapers: Papers with pinned sections or content
pins.fullPaperFragmentPapersEmpty: No papers with pinned sections or content yet (fragment pins need a linked catalog document).
pins.emptyFullPaperTitle: Nothing in full paper view yet
pins.emptyFullPaperHint: Pin whole documents from the explorer, or pin sections inside an article to see them grouped here.
pins.removeConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. The pin will be permanently removed from this board.
pins.editNoteSaveFailedGeneric: Something went wrong while saving. Try again.
pins.documentPinBodyHint: Pinned as the whole catalog document.
pins.imagePlaceholder: Image preview is not available yet (see human-pin-storage).
pins.fallbackKind: No dedicated layout for “{kind}”. Raw data:

capture.buttonAria: Add this content to the pinboard
capture.markmapPreviewHint: Markdown source for this map (preview may be truncated):

pins.savedSearchCardHint: Open the explorer with this saved filter set.
pins.savedSearchRemoveConfirmDescription: This removes “{name}” from your saved searches. You can save the current explorer filters again later.

map.label: Map
map.emptyTooltip: No pinned articles have a location yet. Pin articles with coordinates to populate the map.
map.emptyBody: None of your pinned articles have a location yet.

drawer.loadError: Could not load the article. Please try again.
drawer.detailsDescription: Detailed article view with summary, recipe, and chat.

exports.signInRequired: Sign in to generate a download.

wizard.title: Create podcast
wizard.loadingDocumentsDescription: Full-article pins use the article full text as podcast context.
wizard.noSelection: Select pins on the board before creating a podcast.
wizard.noTextForItem: No text content was found for this pin.
wizard.instructionsPlaceholder: Tone, audience, emphasis, or points to include.
wizard.generatingDescription: Gemini will draft a speech-friendly summary from the selected pins. Review and edit the script before generating audio.
wizard.completeTitle: Podcast is being added to artifacts
wizard.completeDescription: The generated audio will appear in the Podcasts section of this board.
wizard.completeHelp: You can close this wizard and open the Artifacts section to listen to or download the podcast.
wizard.summaryFailed: Could not create the podcast script.
wizard.audioFailed: Could not generate the podcast audio.
wizard.documentTextFailed: Could not load the full text for one of the selected articles.

validation.empty: Select at least one pin before creating a podcast.
validation.tooManyItems: Select at most {max} pins. You currently selected {current}.
validation.emptyText: The selected pins do not include text that can be sent to the podcast generator.
validation.tooMuchText: The selected text is too long: {current} of {max} characters.
validation.scriptTooLong: The reviewed script is too long for text-to-speech: {current} of {max} UTF-8 bytes.
validation.missingProject: Select a project before generating podcast audio.
validation.generic: Review the selected pins before continuing.

artifacts.title: Artifacts
artifacts.audioDescription: Podcast and narration files generated from selected board sources.
artifacts.emptyDescription: You can create audio by selecting sources on the board and choosing Create podcast from the action bar.
artifacts.downloadsDescription: ZIP snapshots of this pinboard (pins, notes, images, and linked articles when available).
artifacts.downloadsEmptyDescription: Generate a ZIP export of the whole pinboard. Large boards may take a minute while images and articles are collected.

wizard.title: Generate PowerPoint presentation
wizard.loadingDocumentsDescription: Full-article pins use the article full text as presentation context.
wizard.noSelection: Select pins on the board before creating a PowerPoint presentation.
wizard.noTextForItem: No text content was found for this pin.
wizard.titleHint: Shown on the cover slide and in the header of every other slide.
wizard.instructionsPlaceholder: Emphasis, audience needs, or points to include.
wizard.structureDescription: Review the generated slide structure before creating the PowerPoint file.
wizard.structureFailed: Could not generate the presentation structure.
wizard.generationFailed: Could not generate the PowerPoint file.
wizard.documentTextFailed: Could not load the full text for one of the selected articles.
wizard.invalidStructure: The reviewed structure is not valid presentation JSON.
wizard.completeDescription: The generated .pptx file will appear in the PowerPoint section of this board.
wizard.completeHelp: You can close this wizard and open the Artifacts section to download the presentation.

artifacts.title: PowerPoint presentations
artifacts.description: Generated .pptx decks created from selected board sources.

search.title: Solutions Explorer
search.dragInstructions: Drag filters between sections to activate or deactivate them
search.removeFiltersHint: Remove filters above to make them available again

empty.sector: No sector data yet. Run a search to load facets.
empty.hazards: No climate impact data yet. Run a search to load facets.
empty.bioregion: No biogeographical region data yet. Run a search to load facets.
empty.adaptationApproaches: No adaptation approach data yet. Run a search to load facets.

visualization.placeholder: Visualization not available for this filter.

viewModes.customComparePlaceholder: e.g. What was the main cost driver? Who funded the project?
viewModes.customCompareEmptyHint: Type a question above, then click Compare to generate summaries for each article.
viewModes.customCompareSubmitHint: Click Compare to generate AI summaries for all articles shown.
viewModes.sectionEmpty: No content for this section in the current language.
viewModes.tooManyForAiTitle: Too many articles for AI summaries
viewModes.tooManyForAiDescription: Each article triggers a separate model call. To avoid high token use, you can run this on at most {max} articles at once. You currently have {current} ({scope}). Narrow your search, or use the checkboxes to select up to {max} articles.
viewModes.tooManyForAiScopeGrid: all articles on this page in the grid
viewModes.mapEmptyDescription: Search results don't contain geographic data
viewModes.umapIntro: This chart groups case studies by EU biogeographical regions — distinct ecological zones used to organise climate adaptation work across Europe. Each dot is one case study; coloured dashed circles surround the studies attributed to each region. Studies that sit close together share similar regional tags.
viewModes.umapIntroNote: For ecological management, the EU is divided into distinct biogeographical regions. These are used to implement the Natura 2000 Biogeographical Regions process to protect habitats and species.
viewModes.umapEmptyDescription: Run a search or adjust filters to see biogeographical regions
viewModes.umapContinentLegendHelp: Hover a bioregion to highlight its case studies; click to pin.
viewModes.umapBridgeHint: Larger dots with a dashed halo span multiple bioregions.

recipe.emptyDescription: There is no structured recipe in the database for this case study in the current language. If you expect data here, apply the latest SQL for get_documents_by_ids (recipe_ingredients) and ensure the pipeline has pushed knowledge.recipe rows.
recipe.loadErrorDescription: The request to load recipe data failed. Check the browser network tab for /api/document-recipe and verify Supabase credentials.

chat.example1: What are the main challenges addressed in this project?
chat.example2: Who are the key stakeholders involved and what are their roles?
chat.example3: Can you summarize the economic impact and main costs?
chat.example4: What solutions or adaptation measures were implemented?
chat.example5: What are the most important lessons learned from this article?

article.noImagesInGallery: No images are linked for this article.
article.sourceLinkHint: Opens the official case study on the EEA Climate-ADAPT website.

contacts.allEmptyTitle: No contacts or references on file
contacts.allEmptyDescription: This case study does not yet have contact persons, websites, or scientific references in the database.

map.emptyDescription: This case study does not yet have geographic coordinates in the database.

prompt.pinTitle: Sign in to use your pinboard
prompt.pinBody: The pinboard is made to save interesting content for future analysis or sharing. Register or sign in to create your board.
prompt.boardTitle: Sign in to view your pinboard
prompt.boardBody: Your pinboard collects everything you pin from the explorer. Register or sign in to create and manage your board.
prompt.genericTitle: Sign in to save your work
prompt.genericBody: This action saves data to your account. Register or sign in to continue.

index.heroTitle: Learn the skills to adapt and thrive in a changing climate
index.heroSubtitle: Here you can explore practical skills to face climate challenges. Filter what interests you from the menu on the left, and discover on the right a collection of tools, courses, and real cases ready to inspire your next steps

empty.title: No skills found
empty.description: Try adjusting your filters or check back later.

header.publicLinkHint: Public board link — anyone with the link can view.
header.shareSignInRequired: Sign in to share this board.
header.signInToManageProjects: Sign in to create and manage projects

dashboard.metaDescription: Manage your explorer projects and pinboards.
dashboard.title: Your projects
dashboard.subtitle: Create and switch between projects to organize pins and saved searches.
dashboard.emptyDescription: Create a project to start pinning and saving searches.
dashboard.promptName: Enter a name for the new project:
dashboard.confirmDelete: Delete this project? Pins and saved searches will be removed.
dashboard.cardDescription: Each project card opens your workspace in the explorer. Use Go to explorer at the bottom of a card (or click anywhere on the card) to browse case studies.
dashboard.signInToManageBody: Projects are saved to your account. Sign in to create and manage projects across devices.
dashboard.emptyFirstBody: Create your first project to start organizing your climate adaptation research and pinned items.
dashboard.confirmDeleteNamed: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
